critical_issues.title: No code changes visible in compare range
critical_issues.recommendation: Push branch changes before running review.

suggestions.title: Add tests mapped 1:1 to acceptance criteria
suggestions.recommendation: Add tests for missing players, missing fields, count bounds, known players, and ValidationResult return behavior.

critical_issues.title: Known-player requirement not enforced
critical_issues.recommendation: Validate required names Don Mattingly, Dave Winfield, Rickey Henderson are present and return ValidationResult invalid if missing.

suggestions.title: Add negative test for missing known players
suggestions.recommendation: Parametrize over required players and assert missing one fails validation.

suggestions.title: Ensure each required known player is independently enforced
suggestions.recommendation: Add parameterized tests removing each required known player one at a time.

suggestions.title: Expand ValidationResult contract tests
suggestions.recommendation: Add parameterized invalid-shape inputs and assert ValidationResult returned without exceptions.

suggestions.title: Harden integer validation and structured error output
suggestions.recommendation: Reject boolean jersey_number values and expose stable error_code in ValidationResult.

suggestions.title: Add explicit upper bound acceptance test
